errors.title: Ollama CUDA Out of Memory
errors.raw_stack_trace:
CUDA error: out of memory
current device: 0, capacity: 24GB
ggml_cuda_mul_mat: out of memory
[ERROR] Failed to allocate 42.5 GB
errors.symptom: Model loading fails or generation stops with OOM.
causes: Model quantization is too large for available VRAM.
Context window is too high and KV cache expands.
GPU layers exceed practical memory budget.

errors.title: Ollama ROCm Not Detected
errors.raw_stack_trace:
ROCm backend unavailable
hipErrorNoBinaryForGpu
No compatible AMD runtime found
errors.symptom: AMD GPU is present but backend falls back to CPU.
causes: GPU architecture not supported by installed ROCm build.

errors.title: Ollama Metal Not Found on macOS
errors.raw_stack_trace:
Metal device not found
MPSGraph unavailable
fallback to CPU
errors.symptom: Apple Silicon machine runs only on CPU path.
